# Final Table

> The definitive live poker manager — built for the table, not the screen.

## What is Final Table?

Final Table is a mobile app designed specifically for live poker players. It lets you log hands, track sessions, build opponent profiles, and review your play — all fast enough to use one-handed between hands at a real poker table.

Unlike online poker trackers or HUDs, Final Table is purpose-built for live casino and home game environments where speed and discretion matter.

## Key Features

- **Three-gesture hand logging**: Log any action (raise, call, fold) by swiping and tapping. No typing, no menus.
- **Drag-and-drop board cards**: Quickly input community cards with intuitive gestures.
- **Opponent profiles**: Automatically build stat-backed profiles (VPIP, aggression, tendencies) on every player you face.
- **Session tracking**: Log buy-ins, cash-outs, and session duration for quick profit/loss records.
- **Hand review**: Replay every logged hand street by street. Compare decisions to GTO baselines.
- **Hand sharing**: Share any hand with friends via a link.
- **Solver-compatible export**: Export hand data in formats compatible with poker solvers.
- **Bankroll tracking**: Set goals and track cumulative results over time with pinch-to-zoom charts.
- **Dealer Mode**: Dealers run the table hands-free with voice commands. Players follow along on their own phones in real time.
- **Quick Session Logger**: For players who don't want full hand tracking — just log buy-in, cash-out, and duration.

## What Final Table is NOT

- **Not a HUD**: Final Table does not display stats or player data during live play. It is a logger, not a heads-up display.
- **Locked during sessions**: While a session is active, the app locks into logging mode. Users cannot browse hands, share data, or access analytics until the session ends.
- **Built for fair play**: All analysis, sharing, and review happens after the session — never at the table with an unfair advantage.

## Target Audience

- Live poker players (casino cash games, tournaments, home games)
- Players who want to track and improve their live game with real data
- Poker enthusiasts transitioning from online to live who want similar tracking tools

## Platform

- Mobile app (iOS and Android)
- Web presence at https://www.finaltable.io

## Current Status

Final Table is in closed beta. Players can reserve their username and join the waitlist at https://www.finaltable.io
